mapper.select:
select count(1) as datacnt from TVHCPL P inner join MSHRHD M on M.COMPKEY = P.COMPKEY and M.SHTRTKY = P.SHTRTKY where P.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and P.VEHICKY = #{vehicky} and P.SHTRTKY = #{shtrtky} and P.DOCCATE = '800' and P.DOCTYPE = '830' and P.SHTRSTS != 'CMP'
order by P.VHPLNKY desc

select P.VHPLNKY as vhplnky, P.VEHICKY as vehicky , P.SHTRTKY as shtrtky , M.SHTRTNM as shtrtnm , date_format(min(P.VHPDATE) , '%Y-%m-%d') as vhpdate , date_format(min(P.VHPTIME) , '%H:%i:%s') as vhptime , fn_sy_usernam(P.COMPKEY , min(P.CREUSER)) as creuser from TVHCPL P inner join MSHRHD M on M.COMPKEY = P.COMPKEY and M.SHTRTKY = P.SHTRTKY where P.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and P.DOCCATE = '800' and P.DOCTYPE = '830' and P.VHPLNKY = #{vhplnky} group by P.VHPLNKY, P.VEHICKY, P.SHTRTKY, M.SHTRTNM

select P.COMPKEY as compkey , P.VHPLNKY as vhplnky , P.VHPLNIT as vhplnit , P.DOCCATE as doccate , P.DOCTYPE as doctype , P.SHTRSTS as shtrsts , P.VEHICKY as vehicky , P.SHTRTKY as shtrtky , P.SHTRTIT as shtrtit , M.CUSTKEY as custkey , M.CUNAMLC as cunamlc , T.SHTRPTY as shtrpty , (select COMCDTX from V_MCODEM C where C.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and C.COMCDKY='SHTRPTY' and COMCDVL=T.SHTRPTY) as shtrpnm , if(P.REPITDT = "", P.REPITDT , date_format(P.REPITDT, '%Y-%m-%d')) as repitdt , concat(SUBSTR(P.REPITTM,1,2), ':' , SUBSTR(P.REPITTM,3,2) , ':', SUBSTR(P.REPITTM,4,2)) as repittm , P.RSNCODE as rsncode , P.RSNREMK as rsnremk , P.VHPLNKY as vhplnky from TVHCPL P inner join MSHRIT T on T.COMPKEY = P.COMPKEY and T.SHTRTKY = P.SHTRTKY and T.SHTRTIT = P.SHTRTIT inner join MCUSMA M on M.COMPKEY = T.COMPKEY and M.CUSTKEY = T.CUSTKEY where P.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and P.VHPLNKY = #{vhplnky} order by P.SHTRTIT , P.SHTRTKY
mapper.insert: insert into TVHCPL ( COMPKEY, VHPLNKY, VHPLNIT , VHPDATE, VHPTIME , DOCCATE, DOCTYPE , SHTRSTS, VEHICKY , SHTRTKY, SHTRTIT , REPITDT, REPITTM, RSNCODE, RSNREMK , CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) select T.COMPKEY as compkey , #{vhplnky} as vhplnky , ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER by SHTRTKY, SHTRTIT asc ) as vhplnit , to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') as credate, to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') as cretime , '800' as doccate , '830' as doctype , 'NEW' , #{vehicky} as vhcfnam , T.SHTRTKY as shtrtky , T.SHTRTIT as shtrtit , ' ' as repitdt, ' ' as repittm , ' ' as rsncode, ' ' as rsnremk , to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') as credate, to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') as cretime, #{creuser} as creuser , to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') as lmodate, to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') as lmotime, #{lmouser} as lmouser from MSHRIT T where T.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and T.SHTRTKY = #{shtrtky} order by T.SHTRTKY, T.SHTRTIT
mapper.select: select count(1) as cntdata , sum(case when T.SHTRSTS = 'NEW' then 1 else 0 end) as cntsnew , sum(case when T.SHTRSTS = 'ING' then 1 else 0 end) as cntsing , sum(case when T.SHTRSTS = 'CMP' then 1 else 0 end) as cntscmp from TVHCPL T where T.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and T.VHPLNKY = #{vhplnky}
SELECT DESTKEY, DENAMLC FROM MDESMA DES WHERE DES.COMPKEY = #{userInfo.compkey}
